items.question: How does the free trial work?
items.answer: You get 14 days of full access to the Pro plan. No credit card required.

items.question: Can I switch plans later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes are prorated.

items.question: Is there a setup fee?
items.answer: No. Getting started takes less than 5 minutes.

items.question: Do you offer refunds?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans.
